nasb.text: Thus the Lord God showed me, and behold, the Lord God was calling to contend with them by fire, and it consumed the great deep and began to consume the farm land.

esv.text: This is what the Lord God showed me: behold, the Lord God was calling for a judgment by fire, and it devoured the great deep and was eating up the land.

cnv.text: 主耶和華向我這樣顯示：看哪！主耶和華召來刑罰的火，燒毀廣大的深淵和以色列的地業。

ccb.text: 以下是主耶和华让我看见的异象：看啊，主耶和华降下审判的大火。大火烧干了深海，正在吞噬土地。
